summary: Create sources/manifest.toml with all v1 sources
description:
## Goal

Create the source registry manifest that tracks all v1 corpus sources with their download URLs, license status, and extraction instructions.

## Output Format

File: sources/manifest.toml

Each source entry includes:
- id: unique identifier (lowercase, hyphenated)
- tradition: tradition category (gnosticism, hermeticism, buddhism, etc.)
- label: human-readable title
- url: source URL
- format: html, html_multi, text, sefaria_api
- license: public_domain (for v1)
- translator: translator name
- notes: extraction instructions

## v1 Sources to Include

See docs/guru-implementation.md Stage 1 for the complete list of v1 sources across traditions:
- Gnosticism: Gospel of Thomas, Gospel of Philip
- Hermeticism: Corpus Hermeticum tractates
- Buddhism: Heart Sutra

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All v1 sources listed in guru-implementation.md are in manifest.toml
- [ ] Each entry has complete fields
- [ ] Format field matches actual source type
- [ ] Notes field includes extraction hints
